title: Anthenantia gigantea
taxonomy: Anthenantia gigantea is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its grass-like foliage and the presence of a seed dispersal mechanism typical of grasses. The genus Anthenantia is further grouped within the subfamily Panicoideae. Further classification within Anthenantia gigantea is needed to determine its specific relationships. Its roots are often boiled in water to create a tea that helps to reduce inflammation and relieve pain.
